---
title: Problem Index
comments: false
toc: false
---

Find posts by practical question.

For language filtering, go to [Posts](/posts/) and filter by tag:
- `lang-kor`
- `lang-eng`

## How should I design or switch hypotheses in a trial?

- [Switching noninferiority and superiority trial](/posts/switching_noninferiority_superiority/)
- [비열등성 가설 설정 tip](/posts/NI-Hypothesis-tip/)
- [통계적 우월성 검정 가설 설정 (단측 검정 vs 양측 검정)](/posts/Hypothesis-Setting-in-Statistical-Superiority/)

## How do I communicate covariate adjustment decisions to regulators?

- [Adjustment of Baseline Covariates in Randomized Controlled Trial](/posts/Adjustment_of_Baseline_Covariates/)
- [Adjustment of Baseline Covariates in Randomized Controlled Trial](/posts/Adjustment_of_Baseline_Covariates_ENG/)
- [Adjustment of baseline covariates](/posts/Adjustment_basline_covariates/)

## How can RWE support decisions without hurting credibility?

- [Use of Real-World Evidence to Support Regulatory Decision-Making for Medical Devices](/posts/RWE_medical_device_FDA/)
- [Considerations Regarding Non-Interventional Studies for Drug and Biological Products Guidance for Industry](/posts/Considerations_Regarding_Non-Interventional_Studies_for_Drug_and_Biological_Products_Guidance_for_Industry/)
- [Reflection Paper on Use of Real World Data in Non-Interventional Studies to Generate Real-World Evidence](/posts/Reflection-Paper-on-Use-of-Real-World-Data-in-Non-Interventional-Studies-to-Generate-Real-World-Evidence/)

## How should I explain guidance to cross-functional teams quickly?

- [FDA Guidance Digest](/guidance-watch/)
- [Comment on Framework for FDA's Real-World Evidence Program - part 1](/posts/Review_Framework_for_FDAs_RWE_Program/)
- [Comment on ICH M14 Guideline - part 1](/posts/Review_ICH_M14_Guideline_part1/)

## Where should a new reader start?

- [Start Here](/start-here/)
- [Categories](/categories/)
- [FDA Guidance Digest](/guidance-watch/)
